commit.subject: LU-17988 - port gerrit_checkpatch to run on python3
commit.message:
LU-17988 - port gerrit_checkpatch to run on python3

Script did not run on python3 as written, required minor mods...

- Removed unnecessary lib import
- Some get calls may return bytes instead of string objects, created
  method to safely handle conversion or return original object
- Updated http calls to use https to avoid redirects

Change-Id: Ifbcbe2e06a0f3da89560b89828679d85b2b25704
Signed-off-by: Lee Ochoa <lochoa@whamcloud.com>
